posts.text:
BREAKING: The US Supreme Court "casts doubt" on President Trump’s bid to roll back birthright citizenship, signaling a potential rejection of a central part of his immigration plan, per Bloomberg.

President Trump is sitting in the front row of the court’s public section amid the oral arguments.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
